content:
{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
[[File:CloneWarsPoster.jpg|thumb|200px|''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars]]'' begins airing on Cartoon Network in November 2003.]]

A list of events in '''2003''' related to ''[[Star Wars]]''.

==January==
*02 – [[Empire 4|''Empire'' 4]] published.
*[[January 3|03]] – ''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]'' published.
*03 – [[Star Wars Insider 65|''Star Wars Insider'' 65]] released to subscribers.
*[[January 8|08]] – [[Republic 48|''Republic'' 48]] published.
*[[January 9|09]] – ''A Traveler's Journals of Ralltiir: Part 2'' published.
*[[January 16|16]] – ''A Traveler's Journals of Ralltiir: Part 3'' published.
*[[January 21|21]] – [[Star Wars Insider 65|''Star Wars Insider'' 65]] published to newsstands.
*[[January 22|22]] – ''[[Star Wars: A Long Time Ago... Volume 4: Screams in the Void]]'' published.
*22 – [[Republic 49|''Republic'' 49]] published.
*[[January 23|23]] – ''A Traveler's Journals of Ralltiir: Part 4'' published.
*23 – ''[[High Alert!]]'' roleplaying mini-adventure published by Wizards of the Coast.
*[[January 29|29]] – ''[[Jango Fett: Open Seasons (TPB)]]'' published.
*30 – ''A Traveler's Journals of Ralltiir: Part 5'' published.
*?? – ''[[Star Wars Adventures 4: Jango Fett vs. the Razor Eaters]]'' published.

==February==
*[[February 1|01]] – ''[[Jedi Quest: The School of Fear]]'' published.
*[[February 5|05]] – [[Empire 5|''Empire'' 5]] published.
*[[February 11|11]] – ''[[Jedi Quest: The Dangerous Games]]'' unabridged cassette published.
*[[February 12|12]] – ''[[A Valentine Story]]'' published.
*[[February 13|13]] – ''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic I: Remnant]]'' published.
*[[February 14|14]] – [[Star Wars Insider 66|''Star Wars Insider'' 66]] is released for subscribers.
*[[February 25|25]] – ''[[Jedi Quest: The Master of Disguise]]'' abridged cassette published.
*[[February 26|26]] – ''[[Jedi: Mace Windu]]'' published.
*26 – [[Republic 50|''Republic'' 50]] published.
*26 – ''[[Star Wars Tales Volume 3]]'' published.
*[[February 28|28]] – [[Harrison Davis]] is born.
*?? – ''[[A Forest Apart]]'' published.
*?? – ''[[Star Wars Adventures 5: The Shape-Shifter Strikes]]'' published.
*?? – ''[[Twi'light Storm]]'' published.

==March==
*[[March 4|04]] – ''[[Tatooine Ghost]]'' hardcover published.
*04 – [[Star Wars Insider 66|''Star Wars Insider'' 66]] published.
*[[March 5|05]] – [[Empire 6|''Empire'' 6]] published.
*[[March 12|12]] – [[Star Wars Tales 15|''Star Wars Tales'' 15]] published.
*[[March 19|19]] – [[Republic 51|''Republic'' 51]] published.
*[[March 20|20]] – [[Masquerade (online adventure)|''Masquerade'']] published on Wizards of the Coast website.
*[[March 28|28]] – [[Star Wars Insider 67|''Star Wars Insider'' 67]] is released for subscribers.
*?? – ''[[Star Wars Adventures 6: The Warlords of Balmorra]]'' published.

==April==
*[[April 1|01]] – ''[[Boba Fett: Crossfire]]'' paperback published.
*[[April 9|09]] – [[Empire 7|''Empire'' 7]] published.
*09 – [[Republic 52|''Republic'' 52]] published.
*[[April 15|15]] – [[Star Wars Insider 67|''Star Wars Insider'' 67]] published.
*[[April 17|17]] – ''[[Positive ID]]'' mini-adventure released.
*[[April 19|19]] – ''[[Ultimate Alien Anthology]]'' published.
*[[April 22|22]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (video game)|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'']] released on the [[Wikipedia:Xbox|Xbox]] platform.
*[[April 29|29]] – ''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic II: Refugee]]'' published.
*[[April 30|30]] – [[Republic 53|''Republic'' 53]] published.
*?? – ''[[Boba Fett: Maze of Deception]]'' published.
*?? – ''[[Star Wars Adventures 7: The Ghostling Children]]'' published.

==May==
*[[May 1|01]] – ''[[Jedi Quest: The Shadow Trap]]'' published.
*[[May 5|05]] – ''[[Inside the Worlds of Star Wars: Attack of the Clones]]'' published.
*[[May 12|12]] – [[Lucasfilm Animation]] is founded.
*12 – [[Star Wars Insider 68|''Star Wars Insider'' 68]] is released for subscribers.
*[[May 14|14]] – ''[[Jedi: Shaak Ti]]'' published.
*[[May 16|16]]-[[May 18|18]] – [[Star Wars Weekends|''Star Wars'' Weekends]] returns to Disney-MGM Studios after a one year absence, becoming an annual event.
*[[May 21|21]] – [[Empire 8|''Empire'' 8]] published.
*21 – [[Kamikaze Douga]] founded.
*[[May 22|22]] – ''[[The Kitonak Connection]]'' mini-adventure released.
*[[May 23|23]]-[[May 25|25]], [[May 30|30]]-[[May 31|31]] – ''Star Wars'' Weekends continues at Disney-MGM Studios.
*?? – ''[[Star Wars Adventures 8: The Hunt for Anakin Skywalker]]'' published.

==June==
*[[June 1|01]] – ''Star Wars'' Weekends continues at Disney-MGM Studios.
*[[June 3|03]] – [[Shatterpoint (novel)|''Shatterpoint'']] published.
*03 – [[Star Wars Insider 68|''Star Wars Insider'' 68]] published.
*[[June 4|04]] – [[Republic 54|''Republic'' 54]] published.
*[[June 6|06]]-[[June 8|08]], [[June 13|13]]-[[June 15|15]] – ''Star Wars'' Weekends continues at Disney-MGM Studios.
*[[June 24|24]] – [[Warren Kremer]] dies.
*[[June 25|25]] – [[Star Wars Tales 16|''Star Wars Tales'' 16]] published.
*[[June 26|26]] – ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'' released on the [[Wikipedia:Personal computer|PC]] platform.
*[[June 27|27]] – [[Star Wars Insider 69|''Star Wars Insider'' 69]] released for subscribers.
*[[June 28|28]] – ''[[Hero's Guide]]'' published.
*?? – ''[[Star Wars Adventures 9: Capture Arawynne]]'' published.

==July==
*[[July 1|01]] – ''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic III: Reunion]]'' published.
*[[July 2|02]] – [[Republic 55|''Republic'' 55]] published.
*02 – [[Empire 9|''Empire'' 9]] published.
*[[July 9|09]] – ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume 1: The Defense of Kamino]]'' published.
*[[July 15|15]] – ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' released on the Xbox platform.
*[[July 23|23]] – [[Empire 10|''Empire'' 10]] published.
*[[July 24|24]] – ''[[Zygerrian Takedown]]'' published.
*[[July 30|30]] – [[Republic 56|''Republic'' 56]] published.
*?? – ''[[Star Wars Adventures 10: Trouble on Tatooine]]'' published.
*?? – ''[[Star Wars: Short Story Collection]]'' published.
*?? – [[Star Wars Insider 69|''Star Wars Insider'' 69]] published.

==August==
*[[August 1|01]] – ''[[Legacy of the Jedi]]'' published.
*[[August 15|15]] – [[Star Wars Insider 70|''Star Wars Insider'' 70]] released for subscribers.
*[[August 20|20]] – ''[[Jedi: Aayla Secura]]'' published.
*[[August 27|27]] – [[Star Wars: Empire: Volume One: Betrayal|''Empire: Volume One: Betrayal'']] published.
*[[August 30|30]] – [[Reginald Thomason]] dies.
*?? – ''[[Galactic Campaign Guide]]'' published.
*?? – ''[[Star Wars Adventures 11: Danger on Naboo]]'' published.

==September==
*[[September 8|08]] – [[Nicolas Cantu]] is born.
*[[September 10|10]] – [[Empire 11|''Empire'' 11]] published.
*[[September 16|16]] – ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]'' released on the PC platform.
*[[September 18|18]] – ''[[With the Band]]'' released.
*[[September 24|24]] – [[Republic 57|''Republic'' 57]] published.
*[[September 26|26]] – [[Star Wars Insider 71|''Star Wars Insider'' 71]] released for subscribers.
*[[September 30|30]] – ''[[The New Essential Guide to Vehicles and Vessels]]'' published.
*[[September 30|30]] – ''[[The New Jedi Order: The Final Prophecy]]'' published.
*?? – ''[[Star Wars Adventures 12: Podrace to Freedom]]'' published.
*?? – [[Star Wars Insider 70|''Star Wars Insider'' 70]] published.

==October==
*[[October 1|01]] – [[Star Wars Tales 17|''Star Wars Tales'' 17]] published.
*[[October 20|20]] – ''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron III: Rebel Strike|Rogue Squadron III: Rebel Strike]]'' released on the Gamecube platform.
*[[October 22|22]] – [[Empire 12|''Empire'' 12]] published.
*23 – ''[[Rebel Jedi]]'' published.
*[[October 25|25]] – [[Anne Gerety]] dies.
*?? – ''[[Boba Fett: Hunted]]'' published.
*?? – [[Star Wars Insider 71|''Star Wars Insider'' 71]] published.

==November==
*[[November 1|01]] – ''[[Jedi Quest: The Moment of Truth]]'' published.
*[[November 4|04]] – ''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]'' published. The [[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order|''New Jedi Order'' series]] ends.
*[[November 5|05]] – [[Gilda Cohen]] dies.
*[[November 6|06]] – [[Star Wars Infinities: Return of the Jedi 1|''Star Wars Infinities: Return of the Jedi'' 1]] published.
*[[November 7|07]] – "[[Clone Wars Chapter 1]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[November 9|09]] – [[Art Carney]] dies.
*[[November 10|10]] – "[[Clone Wars Chapter 2]]" airs on Cartoon Network.
*10 – [[Rovio Entertainment]] is founded.
*[[November 11|11]] – "[[Clone Wars Chapter 3]]" airs on Cartoon Network.
*[[November 12|12]] – [[John Tartaglione]] dies.
*12 – "[[Clone Wars Chapter 4]]" airs on Cartoon Network.
*12 – [[Star Wars: Republic: The Stark Hyperspace War (TPB)|''Star Wars: Republic: The Stark Hyperspace War'' trade paperback]] published.
*[[November 13|13]] – "[[Clone Wars Chapter 5]]" airs on Cartoon Network.
*[[November 14|14]] – "[[Clone Wars Chapter 6]]" airs on Cartoon Network.
*14 – [[Star Wars Insider 72|''Star Wars Insider'' 72]] released for subscribers.
*[[November 17|17]] – "[[Clone Wars Chapter 7]]" airs on Cartoon Network.
*[[November 18|18]] – ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' released on the PC platform.
*18 – ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]'' released on the Xbox platform.
*18 – "[[Clone Wars Chapter 8]]" airs on Cartoon Network.
*[[November 19|19]] – "[[Clone Wars Chapter 9]]" airs on Cartoon Network.
*[[November 20|20]] – "[[Clone Wars Chapter 10]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*20 – ''[[Nightsaber]]'' published.
*[[November 26|26]] – [[Empire 13|''Empire'' 13]] published.

==December==
*[[December 2|02]] – [[Star Wars Insider 72|''Star Wars Insider'' 72]] published.
*[[December 3|03]] – ''[[Jedi: Count Dooku]]'' published.
*[[December 10|10]] – [[Empire 14|''Empire'' 14]] published.
*[[December 17|17]] – [[Republic 58|''Republic'' 58]] published.
*[[December 21|21]] – [[Ron Frazier]] dies.
*[[December 24|24]] – [[Empire 15|''Empire'' 15]] published.
*24 – [[Star Wars Tales 18|''Star Wars Tales'' 18]] published.
*[[December 26|26]] – [[Star Wars Insider 73|''Star Wars Insider'' 73]] released for subscribers.
*[[December 30|30]] – ''[[Star Wars Galaxies: The Ruins of Dantooine]]'' published.
*30 – ''[[Tatooine Ghost]]'' published in paperback.
*[[December 31|31]] – [[Republic 59|''Republic'' 59]] published.
*?? – ''[[Night Eyes trilogy]]'' published.
** – ''[[Night's Promise]]''
** – ''[[Night's Friend]]''
** – ''[[Night's Homecoming]]''

==Unknown==
*[[Aidan Barton]] is born.
*[[Lucasfilm Animation]] founded.

***''[[Force Contention]]''
